---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug (描述问题)**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (简要描述你遇到了什么问题。)

**To Reproduce (复现步骤)**
Steps to reproduce the behavior: (请提供复现该问题的步骤：)
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior (预期行为)**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. (描述你预期的正常运行效果。)

**Screenshots (截图/录屏)**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. (如果方便，请上传截图或录屏帮助我们定位问题。)

**Environment (运行环境)**
- macOS Version: [e.g. 14.4 Sonoma]
- MokoPaste Version: [e.g. v1.0.2]
- Device: [e.g. MacBook Pro M3]

**Additional context (其他信息)**
Add any other context about the problem here. (其他与此问题相关的补充信息。)
